meta.title: Brain Rot Score | How Brain-Rotted Are You? - DopaBrain
meta.description: Take the Brain Rot Score quiz! 12 questions about memes, TikTok slang, and internet culture. Find out how chronically online you are.

app.title: 🧠 Brain Rot Score
app.subtitle: How brain-rotted are you?
app.introDesc: 12 questions about internet culture, memes, and slang. Answer honestly... or don't. We're not your parents.

q1.o4: Skibidi dop dop dop yes yes - I can't stop singing it

q2.o2: I've heard this but don't use it
q2.o4: It's giving bestie, it's giving serve, it's giving everything 💅

q3.text: How much short-form content do you watch daily?
q3.o4: Time is a construct. I emerge from the void at 3 AM

q4.o3: Charisma, the ability to charm someone
q4.o4: I have unspoken rizz and I use it daily fr fr

q5.text: When someone says 'no cap', they mean...
q5.o4: No cap fr fr on god that's bussin respectfully 💯

q6.text: How well does the algorithm know you?
q6.o2: It sometimes shows me things I like
q6.o3: It knows me better than I know myself
q6.o4: The algorithm IS me. We are one. FBI agent is my bestie

q7.text: How often do you use memes in daily conversation?
q7.o2: Sometimes, but I have to explain them
q7.o3: Regularly, my friends get the references
q7.o4: I communicate exclusively in memes. Words are optional

q9.text: What does 'slay' mean in internet slang?
q9.o4: SLAY QUEEN YAAAS MOTHER IS MOTHERING 💅✨

q10.text: How long do you scroll before sleeping?
q10.o1: I don't use my phone in bed
q10.o3: At least an hour of doom scrolling
q10.o4: 'One more video' → it's 4 AM and I have regrets

q11.o3: Sigma male grindset - lone wolf mentality
q11.o4: I'm literally on my sigma grindset rn while Phonk plays in my head

q12.text: Do internet phrases slip into your real-life conversations?
q12.o4: Real life IS the internet. There is no difference anymore

champion.name: Digital Detox Champion
champion.desc: Congratulations! Your brain is pristine. You've somehow avoided the internet's brainrot entirely. You probably go outside, touch grass, and read physical books. We're both impressed and slightly confused how you found this quiz.

casual.name: Casual Scroller
casual.desc: You're a healthy, balanced internet user. You know some memes but they don't define you. You can still hold conversations without referencing TikTok sounds. There's hope for you yet.
casual.symptom1: 📱 Checks social media a few times a day
casual.symptom2: 😄 Laughs at memes but doesn't save them

algorithm.name: Algorithm's Favorite
algorithm.desc: The algorithm loves you, and you love it back. You've got solid internet literacy and catch trends quickly. You're teetering on the edge of chronically online. The brainrot is setting in.
algorithm.symptom1: 🔄 'One more scroll' turns into an hour

chronic.name: Chronically Online
chronic.desc: You are chronically online. The internet is your second home, and memes are your first language. You occasionally forget that grass exists outside. Your screen time would make a therapist cry.

touchgrass.name: Touch Grass Immediately
touchgrass.desc: EMERGENCY ALERT: Your brain is fully rotted. Memes flow through your veins and short-form content has replaced your oxygen. You think in TikTok sounds. Please go outside and touch grass IMMEDIATELY. This is not a drill.
touchgrass.symptom2: 🧠 Brain plays meme sounds as background music

share.title: Share your results
share.twitterText: My Brain Rot Score: {score}% - {tier}! 🧠 How brain-rotted are you?
